entity.name: AppLeave

boolean.name: allowNegativeLeaveEmployees
boolean.title: Allow negative values for employee leaves
boolean.help: This option allows an employee to use leave days in advance that are not yet in their leave balance, resulting in a negative leave day balance.

integer.name: useWeeklyPlanningCoefficientSelect
integer.title: Use weekly planning coefficient
integer.help: On weekly plannings, the Activity percentage field indicates a coefficient taken into account in leave calculation based on the person activity. If the employee works part-time, the coefficient is set to 0.5 and the leave calculation is based on this value, earning fewer days than a full-time person whose coefficient is 1. Always: always uses the planning coefficient. Configurable: can be defined per leave type via the Use planning coefficient checkbox. No: the planning coefficient is not taken into account.

boolean.name: isPayrollPreparationExportEnabled
boolean.title: Enable payroll preparation export
boolean.help: By checking this box, you enable leave management in payroll exports.

integer.name: firstLeaveDayPeriod
integer.title: First day of leave period
integer.help: Allows defining the first day of the leave period, i.e. from which day each year the new leave period starts. For example, if it starts on June 1st, enter 1 in this field and 6 in the First month of leave period field.

integer.name: firstLeaveMonthPeriod
integer.title: First month of leave period
integer.help: Allows defining the first month of the leave period, i.e. from which month each year the new leave period starts. For example, if it starts on June 1st, enter 6 in this field and 1 in the First day of leave period field.
